benefits.description: helped transition from anorexic state to normal weight

side_effects.description: severe welts after injection that would come up severely with redness spreading across whole body
anaphylactic shock with bowel and uterus violent contractions, histaminey tingly feeling in back and neck, dizziness, lightheadedness, hands and feet purple, cold body, passing out

protocol_notes: Used compounded pharmacy product with genuine prescription from doctor. No grey market. Had recurring swelling at all previous injection sites simultaneously after each new injection. Required EpiPen and antihistamines. Given Buscopan (muscle relaxant) at ER.
